name: Bill Reed Tennis Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Bill Reed Tennis Complex in La Porte, IN! There are 8 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Kesling Park
description: Kesling Park is a place to play pickleball in La Porte, IN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Michigan City YMCA
description: Michigan City YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Michigan City, IN. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
